creator: cjpm@gmx.es
text:
Seems that the request to override /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libkse.so.3
can be solved. Just by running "make deinstall install clean " allow
install cleanly the port.


2013/10/15 Carlos Jacobo Puga Medina <cjpugmed@gmail.com>

> Regarding to last event, also note that libvgl.so.5 and libkse.so.3 are
> included in /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg directory.
>
> % cd /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/ && ll libvgl.so.5 libkse.so.3
> -r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  98496  2 oct 14:35 libkse.so.3
> -r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  28784  3 ene  2013 libvgl.so.5
>
